name: Temperament selection persists into a run

planSteps.description: Click the temperament card with data-testid temperament-hoarder
The hoarder temperament card shows a selected state (aria-pressed true)
Click the button with data-testid deploy-solo
Wait until the element #screen-results is visible
Click the button with data-testid back-to-guild
The temperament card with data-testid temperament-hoarder still shows aria-pressed true (selection persisted)
